response: IT Procurement’s email regarding the Datadog vendor contract renewal lays out that the current $180K annual Datadog contract expires June 30, with Datadog offering a 3-year renewal at a 14% discount that brings the annual cost to $155K, while a competing alternative Grafana Cloud would cost only $95K annually but require a 3-month migration to implement. Finance requires a final decision on which vendor option to select by May 15 to finalize all arrangements ahead of the existing Datadog contract’s expiration.
